scripts.test: node -e "if(process.env.GITHUB_ACTIONS !== 'true') { console.error('Tests are restricted to GitHub Actions'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest run
scripts.test:watch: node -e "if(process.env.GITHUB_ACTIONS !== 'true') { console.error('Tests are restricted to GitHub Actions'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "if(process.env.GITHUB_ACTIONS !== 'true') { console.error('Tests are restricted to GitHub Actions'); process.exit(1); }" && wdio run wdio.conf.ts
